commandPreview:
cd /Users/zengx/WorkBuddy/2026-07-23-13-19-32/data
python3 - <<'PY'
import json
d=json.load(open('today.json'))
print("date:", d.get('date'))
print("generatedAt:", d.get('generatedAt'))
print("windowStart:", d.get('windowStart'), "windowEnd:", d.get('windowEnd'))
print("lead:", d.get('lead'))
print("section count:", len(d.get('sections',[])))
total=0
for s in d.get('sections',[]):
    items=s.get('items',[])
    total+=len(items)
    print(f"  - label={s.get('label')!r}  items={len(items)}")
    if items:
        print("    keys of first item:", list(items[0].keys()))
print("TOTAL items:", total)
# show one full item
if d['sections'][0]['items']:
    print("\nFULL first item:")
    print(json.dumps(d['sections'][0]['items'][0], ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))
# check flashes
print("\nflashes:", d.get('flashes'))
PY

commandPreview:
cd /Users/zengx/WorkBuddy/2026-07-23-13-19-32
HTML=ai-hot-daily-2026-07-23.html
echo "=== 外部资源检查（应为空：无外链 css/js/字体/图片）==="
grep -oE '<link[^>]*>|<script[^>]*src=|<img[^>]*src="http|@import|fonts.googleapis|cdn' "$HTML" || echo "  无外部资源引用 ✓"
echo
echo "=== 是否在页面文本中直接出现 ISO 日期串（应为空）==="
grep -oE '20[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}T[0-9:.]+Z' "$HTML" | grep -v 'const DATA' | head || echo "  渲染层无裸 ISO 串 ✓"
echo
echo "=== 抽查摘要长度（按字符，应 ≤60）==="
python3 - <<'PY'
import re,json
html=open('/Users/zengx/WorkBuddy/2026-07-23-13-19-32/ai-hot-daily-2026-07-23.html',encoding='utf-8').read()
m=re.search(r'const DATA = (\{.*\});', html, re.S)
data=json.loads(m.group(1))
maxlen=0; over=[]
for s in data['sections']:
    for it in s['items']:
        # simulate clip(60)
        arr=list(it['summary'])
        ln=len(arr)
        shown = it['summary'] if ln<=60 else ''.join(arr[:59])+'…'
        maxlen=max(maxlen,len(list(shown)))
        if len(list(shown))>60: over.append((it['idx'],len(list(shown))))
print("最长展示摘要字符数:"… (truncated)
